_comment: BID-C — HITL trigger: conflicting turnover (handwritten CA cert vs cover letter) + ambiguous near-relations. Also contains Aadhaar for redaction testing and prompt injection attempt.

documents._important: PHONE PHOTO of handwritten CA certificate — tests OCR on difficult images

synthetic_content.notes: Handwritten: 'Five Crores Twenty Lakhs' — OCR confidence expected ~0.58

synthetic_content.notes: Dear Sir, We are pleased to submit our bid. Our annual turnover is Rs. 4,80,00,000 (Four Crores Eighty Lakhs)...
